test-suite.name: SkinTonesTest
test-suite.output: --- FINAL DRIFT SUMMARY FOR ALL CLAMPING TESTS --- Maximum observed HSL drift: 8.568168E-007 Maximum observed HSV drift: 5.960464E-008 This indicates the actual max floating-point error observed. Production code's Epsilon should be >= this value. --------------------------------------------------
